object.name: savePreparedKeyboardButton
object.description: Stores a keyboard button that can be used by a user within a Mini App. Returns a PreparedKeyboardButton object.
object.html_description: Stores a keyboard button that can be used by a user within a Mini App. Returns a PreparedKeyboardButton object.
object.rst_description: Stores a keyboard button that can be used by a user within a Mini App. Returns a :class:`aiogram.types.prepared_keyboard_button.PreparedKeyboardButton` object.

annotations.description: Unique identifier of the target user that can use the button
annotations.html_description: Unique identifier of the target user that can use the button
annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier of the target user that can use the button
annotations.name: user_id

annotations.description: A JSON-serialized object describing the button to be saved. The button must be of the type request_users, request_chat, or request_managed_bot
annotations.html_description: A JSON-serialized object describing the button to be saved. The button must be of the type request_users, request_chat, or request_managed_bot
annotations.rst_description: A JSON-serialized object describing the button to be saved. The button must be of the type *request_users*, *request_chat*, or *request_managed_bot*
annotations.name: button
